---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the Qubixsa Quote Generator.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm always typing client details manually when they exist...")

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Database Changes Required?**
- [ ] Yes (requires new columns/tables/RPCs)
- [ ] No

**Language Support Needed**
- [ ] Arabic (RTL)
- [ ] English (LTR)
- [ ] Both

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or screenshots about the feature request here.
